calendar.matters:
First, Second And Final Acount Of Trsutee And Petition For 1) Approval And Settlement Of Sccounts, 2) Award Of Trustee'S Fees, 3) Award Of Attorneys'
Off Calendar Jul-09-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Erika Yuen appeared by zoom for Mary Ann Graves (Trustee).
Deidre Von Rock and Joilene Wood Grove appeared by zoom for Jennifer Mikula (Beneficiary).

The Court stated that it received Ms. Yuen's points and authorities regarding venue being in San Francisco because Counsel's office is in San Francisco, and asked Ms. Yuen if it is her position that she is the representative of the trust who is primarily responsible, if she accepts liability for any claims from any beneficiary, whether the beneficiaries can present claims against her firm, whether a surcharge can be issued against Yuen & Yuen and where the notice is regarding this. Ms. Yuen stated that the Trustee is primarily responsible, that the Trustee needed extensive assistance regarding the issue of bank fraud and initially stated that she accepts such responsibility. Ms. Yuen also stated that there is no notice regarding this issue, that their responsibility is to the beneficiaries at all times, then stated that she would not share any liability if the Trustee is surcharged, that there is no appropriate venue in which to bring the petition and that the assets in the trust are in San Francisco. The Court noted that this trust was created in California where there is a Trustee that resides out California, that the trust is not under supervision, that there is no analysis of Arizona or Texas, and questions what authority it has over non trust assets. Ms. Yuen stated that she advised her Client to petition the Court for approval of the accountings. Ms. Von Rock stated that if the Court does not feel it has jurisdiction over the non-trust assets, then it doesn't have jurisdiction, and that the beneficiaries have consented. The Court stated that it is persuaded by the argument under Probate Code 17005(c), but it does not intend to grant any relief regarding the non-trust assets. The First, Second and Final Account of Trustee and Petition for Approval and Settlement of Accounts, etc. is under submission. The Order to Show Cause Re Dismissal for Lack of Jurisdiction or Proper Venue is off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2021 Off Calendar
